finding.rootCause: Three record stores trusted client workspace labels, proposal and approval hydration retained missing server-backed rows, accounting connectors were global, and generic workspace APIs silently substituted the active tenant for an unauthorized requested tenant.
finding.correction: Server tenant authority now controls record workspace identity, nonmember tenant ids fail with 403, active-org server collections hydrate authoritatively, and transactions plus connector state are organization-scoped.

nextCycle: Exercise the complete browser account lifecycle and authorization-error recovery across customer/admin hosts and roles.
